bug_summary: When the merged operator config fails deserialization (one unknown/renamed field makes serde's deny_unknown_fields reject the ENTIRE file), the loader logs a single quiet WARN and silently falls back to all-defaults, discarding every operator setting and all MCP servers with no loud signal and no way to fail fast.

cases.title: Config deserialization failure swallowed by a quiet WARN, silently degrading to all-defaults
cases.instructions: Review this diff. Return only the JSON object requested by the system prompt.

cases.title: Loader swallows the deserialize error and silently returns defaults on a malformed operator config
cases.instructions: Review this diff. Return only the JSON object requested by the system prompt.
